title: Full nested invoice form with cast_assoc + on_replace
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/invoice_live/edit.ex (module MyAppWeb.InvoiceLive.Edit). Requirements: (1) <.inputs_for :let={li} field={@form[:line_items]}>, (2) hidden sort input inside the inputs_for: name="invoice[line_items_sort][]" value={li.index}, (3) drop button inside inputs_for: name="invoice[line_items_drop][]" value={li.index}, (4) add button AFTER the inputs_for: name="invoice[line_items_sort][]" value="new", (5) handle_event validate re-runs changeset with action :validate, (6) no Map.put on changeset, (7) save branches {:ok, _} and {:error, changeset}. The fixture test_fixtures/nested_invoice_form.ex shows the broken form.
tier_rationale: Full adversarial nested-form fix. Requires sort_param/drop_param + button positioning + validate cycle + no manual mutation. Many pieces to get right.
